---
title: "Investing in Intelligence"
subtitle: "Real Options, Default Risk, and Strategic Competition in AI Compute Infrastructure"
date: today
date-format: long
output-file: ai_lab_investment
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-size: 13%
  data-background-position: 97% 91%
---


{{< include _introduction.qmd >}}

{{< include _model.qmd >}}

{{< include _results.qmd >}}

{{< include _calibration.qmd >}}

{{< include _revealed_beliefs.qmd >}}

{{< include _conclusion.qmd >}}


## Thank you! {.center}

Questions?

---

## References {.smaller}
